name: The Unsigned Draft
effect: Circulate a document with no named author. This card is considered collaborative.

clauses.name: DISTRIBUTED OWNERSHIP CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If accountability is sought: Ownership is redistributed across all stakeholders simultaneously.

clauses.name: VERSION HISTORY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a version history exists: It is considered too long to review.

clauses.name: CONSENSUS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the document is approved: The approver is considered a contributor, not an author.

witness_quote: I think someone in legal touched it.
